PREMIER LEAGUE DEADLIEST: Thierry Henry vs. Ruud van Nistelrooy! Who was truly elite?

Henry had the swagger, the assists, the Invincible aura, and 4 Golden Boots. But RVN? Pure, brutal penalty-box POACHER. 150 goals in 219 games for United. Not flashy, just lethal. Titi was an artist; Ruud was a hitman. Both changed the game. But whose impact was scarier?
